meaning: n.巴斯克维尔体(John Baskerville 所设计的古式艺术字体)
examples: Sir Henry said he wanted to go to Baskerville Hall.
"We must send a telegram to check whether Barrymore is in London or at Baskerville Hall," said Holmes.
At last we reached the gates of Baskerville Hall.
The event will be staged at Baskerville Hall Hotel, in Clyro.
